chosen_logo.why: Inline SVG with class 'logo__mi' sitting in the global header on every page. ViewBox 0 0 112 112 (square), 2 paths (orange rounded-square shell + inner white 'mi' mark). Visually matches the canonical orange squircle in the home / about / mobile / smart-home shot.png headers. Vector + already two-tone, no need for currentColor flipping.

brand_primary.name: xiaomi-orange
brand_primary.evidence: color_frequency: #FF6700 ×24 across 6 pages + #FF6900 ×8 (logo-internal variant). The single recognisable brand chord across the entire global site.

brand_secondary.name: ink-deep
brand_secondary.evidence: color_frequency: #191919 ×35 across 6 pages — used for display headings on white surfaces (about / mobile / smart-home heroes).

ink.name: ink
ink.evidence: Same as secondary — Xiaomi pairs ink-deep #191919 with paper white as the base reading colour, not pure #000.

paper.name: paper
paper.evidence: color_frequency: #FFFFFF ×49 across 7 pages — dominant page surface on about / mobile / smart-home / 17 Ultra (white-out base for product photography).

accents.name: mid
accents.evidence: color_frequency: #898989 ×72 across 4 pages — secondary text + meta labels + spec bullets.

accents.name: surface
accents.evidence: color_frequency: #F5F5F5 + #F7F7F7 + #EFEFEF — neutral wash for product cards / 'Featured Products' track on home.

accents.name: link
accents.evidence: color_frequency: #1D4ED8 ×10 across 5 pages — used for hyperlink semantics (legal, support, sustainability).

accents.name: stage
accents.evidence: color_frequency: #000000 ×94 — the dark cinematic stage Xiaomi uses for hero / product launch covers (Leica imaging cooperation banner, 17 Ultra photography).

display_font.evidence: fonts.computed_heading + fonts.frequencies: 'MiSans Latin' ×49 — Xiaomi's proprietary geometric sans, freely licensed. Used for every display surface from nav to hero to product names.

body_font.evidence: fonts.computed_primary + fonts.frequencies: same family carried into long-form body, paired with 'MiSans' / 'Hiragino Sans GB' / 'Microsoft Yahei' for CJK fallback chain.

mono_font.evidence: Default-stack fallback — Xiaomi global doesn't ship a custom mono; SF Mono / Menlo on Apple, Consolas on Windows is the visual register their docs pages use.

spacing_radius_shadow.evidence: Computed_palette across about / mobile / smart-home shows white-out flat surfaces, no card shadows. CTAs are fully-rounded pills ('Learn more' on home hero, 'Buy Now' green pill on product pages). Cards are 8-12 px radius. Hero photography provides depth instead of shadows. Section padding is generous (multi-screen scroll rhythm).

precedents: Apple product page rhythm (white-out + dramatic product photography)
Leica brand poise (Xiaomi × Leica imaging cooperation is on the home banner)
Samsung Galaxy flagship pages (dense spec-led typography on dark stages)
aesthetic.voice_register: aspirational-technical — 'Innovation for everyone' is the corporate slogan: democratised flagship-grade engineering, restated with confidence, not marketing fluff
